description: Baseline conflict impact data for all SCEM-tracked theatres. Sourced from UN agencies, ACLED, UCDP, IDMC, UNHCR, and Tier-1 institutional reporting. Updated weekly by the synthesiser pipeline.
methodology_note: Figures represent best available estimates from institutional sources. Casualty figures are inherently contested — source attribution is provided for every figure. 'Human cost' summaries are written for general readers; structured data fields serve professional users and future API access.

human_cost.military: Israel: ~471 KIA, 2,995 WIA (IDF, Jan 2026); Hamas: est. 17,000 KIA (IDF est. older)
human_cost.recent_rate: ~20-40 Palestinians killed/week since Oct 2025 ceasefire (OCHA weekly, Apr 2026)
human_cost.displacement_trend: Stable post-ceasefire but persistent in sites (OCHA Apr 2026)
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted: limited crossings, insufficient aid (OCHA Apr 2026)
human_cost.key_blockages: Kerem Shalom (main), Rafah (limited); blockages from security/escalations OCHA
human_cost.casualty_source: Gaza MoH (Palestinian), IDF (Israeli military), cited by OCHA

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Israel: tanks, airstrikes, artillery; Hamas: rockets, small arms
military_situation.arms_embargoes: UN arms embargo on Hamas/armed groups in Gaza

international_legal.icc: Arrest warrants issued Nov 2024 for Netanyahu, Gallant (Israel); Deif, Al-Masri (Hamas) ICC via reports
international_legal.icj: Ongoing genocide case (South Africa v Israel); Israel response filed Mar 2026 ICJ/SA
international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res 2803 (2025) endorsing US ceasefire plan ReliefWeb
international_legal.ceasefire_status: Fragile/in name only since 10 Oct 2025; ongoing violations/strikes (OCHA Apr 2026)

human_cost.casualties: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded in Lebanon (Lebanese Health Ministry, Apr 2026). Israel: 11+ soldiers, 2 civilians killed.
human_cost.military: Lebanon/Hezbollah: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded (total); Hezbollah fighters: 400+ (internal) / 1,400+ (IDF claim) killed. Israel: 11+ soldiers, 2 civilians killed, multiple wounded. As of 11 Apr 2026 Wikipedia
human_cost.recent_rate: 8 Apr: 357 killed (Operation Eternal Darkness); 10 Apr: 28 killed. ~100 Hezbollah fighters past days (13 Apr). Wikipedia, UN News
human_cost.refugees: ~243,000 crossed to Syria (mostly Syrians returning, some Lebanese); Apr 2026 UNHCR via ReliefWeb
human_cost.people_in_need: 2.99M (pre-escalation; now higher due to 1.2M displaced) Lebanon UN
human_cost.food_insecurity: ~874k IPC Phase 3+ (Nov25-Mar26); projected 961k Apr-Jul (pre-war, worsened) WFP
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted/blocked: Bridges destroyed (Litani), isolating 150k+; attacks on health (61 attacks) OCHA ReliefWeb
human_cost.aid_funding_gap: Flash Appeal $308M: 29% funded (Mar); UNICEF 74-77% gap; UNFPA 88% gap ReliefWeb, UNICEF
human_cost.key_blockages: Litani River bridges destroyed (Qasmiyeh etc.), cutting south; other routes blocked OCHA
human_cost.casualty_source: Lebanese Health Ministry, IDF claims, UN OHCHR (earlier: 886 killed as of 17 Mar) Wikipedia, UN OHCHR

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Israel: Airstrikes, Merkava tanks, artillery, white phosphorus. Hezbollah: Rockets/missiles (2,000+), drones, anti-tank missiles Wikipedia
military_situation.new_capabilities: Hezbollah: New domestically-produced drones/missiles; Israel: Iron Beam laser (operational?), layered anti-drone (Drone Dome etc.) Times of Israel
military_situation.external_suppliers: Hezbollah: Iran ($50M/month, tech/know-how). Israel: US (primary) Reuters
military_situation.arms_embargoes: None new; UNSCR 1701 arms embargo on Hezbollah south of Litani (ongoing, violated) UNIFIL

international_legal.unsc_resolutions: UNSCR 1701 (2006, ongoing: no arms south Litani, ceasefire violations) UNIFIL
international_legal.ceasefire_status: No active ceasefire; Iran-US-Israel 7 Apr (excludes Lebanon per Israel/US); violated immediately (8 Apr strikes) Wikipedia

timeline.most_recent_escalation: 13 Apr: IDF encircled Bint Jbeil, killed 100+ Hezbollah Wikipedia
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: 9-12 Apr: US-mediated talks Israel-Lebanon (Washington/Naqoura); rejected by Israel Wikipedia

human_cost.military: ~93,000 total fatalities (ACLED to Jan 2026, includes both sides; wounded unknown)
human_cost.food_insecurity: >12M acute hunger, 1M emergency (WFP); IPC not specified

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Junta: Chinese jets/drones, Russian helicopters, cluster munitions, landmines
military_situation.new_capabilities: Drones (both sides), Russian combat drones for junta
military_situation.external_suppliers: Junta: China (NORINCO), Russia, Iran (fuel), Thailand (parts); Resistance: improvised/self-made
military_situation.arms_embargoes: UNGA non-binding (2021); calls for UNSC comprehensive embargo

international_legal.icc: Ongoing (Bangladesh/Myanmar); arrest warrant applied for Min Aung Hlaing (Nov 2024)
international_legal.icj: Gambia v. Myanmar (Rohingya genocide); hearings Jan 2026
international_legal.ceasefire_status: Junta post-earthquake ceasefire extended to May 2026; violated

timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: China-brokered ceasefires; junta earthquake truce (extended Mar 2026)

human_cost.casualties: 15,172 killed + 41,378 injured (UN OHCHR, Jan 2026; likely higher)
human_cost.military: Russia: ~1.3 million (Ukrainian Gen Staff, Apr 2026); Ukraine: 500k-600k (CSIS, Jan 2026)
human_cost.recent_rate: 211 civilians killed, 1,206 injured in Mar 2026 (UN OHCHR); Russia ~1,000/day (Ukr Gen Staff)
human_cost.host_countries: Europe (Germany, Poland, Czech Rep top hosts)
human_cost.food_insecurity: N/A (ongoing needs due to infrastructure attacks)
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted; frequent attacks on aid workers/infra
human_cost.key_blockages: Rail/ports disrupted by strikes; frontlines blocked
human_cost.casualty_source: UN OHCHR (civilians), Ukrainian General Staff & CSIS (military)

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Tanks, artillery, drones, missiles, air defense systems
military_situation.external_suppliers: Russia: North Korea, Iran; Ukraine: US, NATO allies

international_legal.icc: Arrest warrants for Putin, Lvova-Belova (2023), Shoigu, Gerasimov, others (2024)
international_legal.icj: Ukraine v Russia (genocide); counter-claims admitted Dec 2025, ongoing to 2027
international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res 2774 (2025, ceasefire call); recent GA res Feb 2026
international_legal.ceasefire_status: No permanent; temporary Easter truce Apr 11-12 2026 (violations reported)

timeline.most_recent_escalation: Intensified energy infra attacks winter 2026; frontline advances
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: Orthodox Easter ceasefire Apr 2026; stalled US-mediated talks

human_cost.casualties: ~11,300 killed in 2025 (OHCHR Feb 2026); cumulative direct civilian ~20,000+ killed, total excess deaths 150,000+ OHCHR, HRW World Report 2026
human_cost.military: Unknown (estimates for total deaths ~150,000+ incl. military/civilian/indirect; military-specific unavailable)
human_cost.recent_rate: 478 civilians killed by drones Jan-Feb 2026 (ACLED); sharp increase in 2025 OHCHR
human_cost.host_countries: Chad, South Sudan, Egypt, Ethiopia, Uganda, CAR, Libya UNHCR
human_cost.food_insecurity: 29M acute (IPC); Famine (Phase 5) in parts of Darfur/Kordofan (Um Baru, Kernoi, Kadugli); risk in 20 areas (Feb 2026 IPC) IPC
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted/blocked (esp. Darfur/Kordofan); attacks on aid, sieges HRW
human_cost.aid_funding_gap: ~84-95% (HAC 16% funded; HRP $2.9B needs 5.5% funded, Feb 2026) UNICEF
human_cost.key_blockages: Limited; blockages in Kordofan/Darfur sieges (Kadugli, Dilling, El Fasher); attacks on convoys ReliefWeb
human_cost.casualty_source: OHCHR, ACLED, HRW (no comprehensive military/wounded cumulative from prioritized sources)

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Artillery, airstrikes, drones (CH-95 Chinese, Akinci Turkish), Su-25, MiG-29 AOAV, NYT
military_situation.new_capabilities: Escalated drone warfare, air defence systems (FK-2000), long-range strikes BBC
military_situation.external_suppliers: SAF: Turkey (Baykar drones), Egypt, Russia, Iran, Pakistan(?), Saudi/Qatar; RSF: UAE (re-export Chinese), China (via UAE), Libya NYT, Amnesty
military_situation.arms_embargoes: UN Darfur arms embargo (Res 1591, 2005; ongoing, frequently violated) UN

international_legal.icc: Ongoing Darfur investigation (since 2005, UNSC referral); warrants for Omar al-Bashir (genocide), others; no new for current war ICC
international_legal.icj: Sudan v. UAE (Genocide Convention, provisional measures hearing Apr 2025) ICJ
international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res 2772 (Feb 2025, extended PoE to Mar 2026); prior: 2750 (Sep 2024, sanctions to 2025), 2736 (Jun 2024, El Fasher) UNSC
international_legal.ceasefire_status: No active ceasefire; repeated failures (Jeddah, etc.); US-Saudi proposal considered Jan 2026 Daily Sabah

timeline.most_recent_escalation: Renewed SAF offensives/retaking Darfur/Kordofan (Jan 2026); RSF advances, drone wars in Kordofan DWAG
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: US-Saudi humanitarian truce proposal (Jan 2026, SAF considering) Daily Sabah

human_cost.casualties: Iran: 1,701+ killed, 26,500+ injured (HRANA Apr 7); Lebanon: 2,089 killed; Israel: 40 killed; total ~4,382–9,956+ killed, 42,017+ injured Wikipedia, OCHA Mar 2026
human_cost.military: Iran: 3,636+ killed (HRANA Apr 7); US: 15 killed, 538+ injured; Israel: low dozens killed; total military ~5,000+ killed/wounded (est.) Wikipedia
human_cost.recent_rate: Post-ceasefire (Apr 8+): Hundreds killed in Lebanon (Operation Eternal Darkness); no weekly figure Wikipedia
human_cost.displacement: Iran: 1.9-3.2 million (gov est. Apr); Lebanon: >1 million UNHCR Apr 8
human_cost.refugees: Limited cross-border; 72k+ Iranians returned from Turkey, 70k+ Afghans from Iran UNHCR Apr
human_cost.host_countries: Turkey (101k arrivals), Pakistan, Afghanistan; returns dominant UNHCR
human_cost.displacement_trend: Rising due to failed ceasefire and blockade UNHCR Apr 8
human_cost.people_in_need: Millions affected; no OCHA total; >10k civilian sites damaged (Iran RC) Wikipedia
human_cost.food_insecurity: No IPC data; fuel/food shortages due to strikes, blockade Wikipedia
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted; 32 medical facilities hit, internet blackout IRCS via Wikipedia
human_cost.key_blockages: Strait of Hormuz blockaded (US Apr 13); energy corridors hit CNN Apr
human_cost.casualty_source: HRANA, Iranian MoH, OCHA, UN OHCHR (Mar-Apr 2026) Wikipedia

military_situation.weapons_deployed: US/Israel: Tomahawk, B-2/B-52, F-35, HIMARS; Iran: Ballistic missiles (1,252+), drones (2,328+), Su-24 Wikipedia, Stars and Stripes Apr 2026
military_situation.new_capabilities: US: LUCAS drone, EA-37B Compass Call; Iran: alleged two-stage ICBM; China MANPADS to Iran Wikipedia, CNN Apr 11
military_situation.external_suppliers: Iran: China (MANPADS, dual-use), Russia (intel); US/Israel: standard US supplies NYT Apr 11
military_situation.arms_embargoes: Pre-existing UN/Iran arms embargo; no new specified [general knowledge]

international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res. 2817 (Mar 11, 2026): Condemns Iran attacks on Gulf states UN Press Mar 11
international_legal.ceasefire_status: Collapsed (Apr 12 Islamabad Talks failed); US blockade started Apr 13 Wikipedia

timeline.most_recent_escalation: US naval blockade Strait of Hormuz (Apr 13, 2026) NYT Apr 13
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: Islamabad Talks (Apr 11-12, failed) Al Jazeera Apr 12

human_cost.casualties: >5 million IDPs indicate massive scale; specific killed/wounded cumulative not found; UN doc 602 executions North/South Kivu early 2025 (OHCHR)
human_cost.recent_rate: Dozens killed weekly in North Kivu (Apr 2026, UN); surge in aerial strikes Mar 2026 (ACLED)
human_cost.displacement: 5.8 million (2026, North Kivu, South Kivu, Ituri); >5 million in Kivus/Ituri (EC Europa; Amnesty)
human_cost.displacement_trend: Rising; 500k new since Dec 2025; returns ongoing but net increase (Amnesty)
human_cost.food_insecurity: 26.6m IPC Phase 3+ (Jan 2026); 10m in east Phase 3+, 3m Phase 4 (WFP; FEWS NET)
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted; incidents up 24% Feb 2026, drone use in urban areas (OCHA; MONUSCO)
human_cost.key_blockages: Goma/Bukavu airports closed; Uvira border issues; RN5/RP529 contested (MONUSCO; Critical Threats)

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Drones (CH-, Bayraktar TB2), fighter jets, attack helicopters, kamikaze drones, SAMs (ACLED; CFR)
military_situation.new_capabilities: Drones/kamikaze drones by both FARDC & M23; unprecedented aerial warfare (Mar 2026 ACLED)
military_situation.external_suppliers: FARDC: China, Turkey, Bulgaria; M23/Rwanda: not specified, Rwanda sanctioned (ACLED; OFAC)
military_situation.arms_embargoes: UN arms embargo on non-gov armed groups, extended to Jul 2026 (SIPRI; UN Res 2783)

international_legal.icc: Ongoing since 2004; renewed North Kivu since Jan 2022 (Oct 2024 ICC)
international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res 2808 (Dec 2025, MONUSCO extension); Res 2783 (Jul 2025, sanctions to 2026); Res 2773 (Feb 2025, condemns M23) (SecurityCouncilReport)
international_legal.ceasefire_status: Multiple collapsed: Angola Feb 2026 violated; Doha/Qatar Jul 2025; Washington Dec 2025 (ongoing violations ReliefWeb)

timeline.most_recent_escalation: Aerial/drone surge Masisi/Rubaya Feb-Mar 2026; drone kill M23 spokesman Willy Ngoma Feb 24 (ACLED; CFR)
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: DRC-Rwanda-US talks Washington Mar 17-18 2026, concrete de-escalation steps (BBC; UN News)

human_cost.casualties: ~5,800 killed, ~2,700 injured in 2025 (BINUH); total since 2021 nearly 20,000 killed (Al Jazeera)
human_cost.military: Limited data; security forces/self-defense vs gangs: ~4,095 killed, ~1,818 wounded (Mar 2025-Jan 2026, UN OHCHR)
human_cost.recent_rate: 70 killed in single weekend attack (late Mar 2026, Le Monde)
human_cost.host_countries: USA, Mexico, Brazil, Canada, Dominican Republic (UNHCR)
human_cost.food_insecurity: 5.7 million acute (IPC Phase 3+), 3-3.5M IPC 3/4 Feb-Sep 2026 (OCHA; FEWS NET)
human_cost.humanitarian_access: Restricted (gang control 90% Port-au-Prince, attacks on aid) (OCHA)
human_cost.key_blockages: Key roads/ports controlled by gangs (Artibonite, Centre depts); blockages due to violence (UN OHCHR)
human_cost.casualty_source: UN OHCHR (Mar 2026 report, period Mar 2025-Jan 2026), BINUH, ACLED

military_situation.weapons_deployed: Heavy-calibre weapons (gangs), small arms, MRAP armored vehicles (police/GSF), explosive drones (private contractors/gov) (ACLED)
military_situation.new_capabilities: Explosive drones (gov/private since Mar 2025), Senator RAM MRAPs (Canada to FADH) (ACLED)
military_situation.external_suppliers: Gangs: USA (Miami/NY via DR), Venezuela/S. America; Gov: USA, Canada (SIPRI)
military_situation.arms_embargoes: UN arms embargo on non-gov entities (extended to Oct 2026, SIPRI)

international_legal.unsc_resolutions: Res 2814 (Jan 2026, BINUH extension); Res 2793 (Sep 2025, GSF auth); Res 2794 (Oct 2025, sanctions extension) (Security Council Report)

timeline.most_recent_escalation: Gran Grif attacks Petite-Rivière de l'Artibonite, ~70 killed (28-29 Mar 2026, Le Monde)
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: Gang Suppression Force (GSF) initial deployment (Apr 2026, Al Jazeera); elections planned Aug 2026 (Security Council Report)

military_situation.weapons_deployed: NK: Hwasong missiles, 600mm MRLs; ROK/US: F-35, Patriots
military_situation.new_capabilities: NK: Solid-fuel ICBM engines (Mar 2026), AI drones, anti-satellite (Feb 2026)

conflicts.current_phase_start: Ongoing tensions (no current armed phase; last crises 1995-96)

military_situation.weapons_deployed: China: PLA aircraft, naval vessels, ballistic missiles; Taiwan: F-16V, HIMARS/ATACMS, Harpoon; US supplies to Taiwan backlog $32B Jan 2026
military_situation.new_capabilities: Taiwan: 1400 anti-ship missiles by 2026, Hellscape drones, Sky Bow III; China: nuclear-armed subs, AI-integrated warfare
military_situation.external_suppliers: Taiwan: United States ($11B+$14B packages 2025-26); China: domestic production (Russia reaffirms support)
military_situation.arms_embargoes: China sanctions on US firms (e.g., Boeing, Northrop) over Taiwan sales; no formal UN embargoes

timeline.most_recent_escalation: China large-scale air incursions (26 aircraft/24h, Mar 15 2026); airspace reservation 40 days (Mar 27-May 6 2026) CFR
timeline.most_recent_peace_effort: Xi-Cheng (KMT) summit Apr 12 2026; Beijing resumes some ties CFR, CNBC
